haiku:
Warm cheese drapes like sun,

Savory smiles bloom bright.
Happy #NationalCheddarFriesDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Mirrors of laughter,
Identical smiles abound,
Joyful hearts align.
Happy #LookAlikeDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Colorful swirls bloom,
Paintbrush whispers joyous dreams,
Laughter fills the air.
#HappyBirthdayJoanMiro from @ClamBakeSanta

Joy melts with each bite.
Happy #NationalChocolateCoveredCashewsDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Colors swirling, stories bloom,
Dreams ignite like stars.
Happy #WorldCreativityAndInnovationDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Pages gently turn,
Whispers of wild moors in bloom,
Ink flows like warm tea.
#HappyBirthdayCharlotteBronte from @ClamBakeSanta

Gentle breezes hum,
Petals swirl in sunlit fields,
Nature’s joy awakes.
Happy #EarthDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Rainbow jewels cascade,
Sugary whispers of cheer,
Hearts bounce with each taste.
Happy #NationalJellybeanDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Pages turn with quiet joy,
Cheers echo through time.
#HappyBirthdayImmanuelKant from @ClamBakeSanta

Happy #NationalCherryCheesecakeDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Pages turn like leaves,
Whispers of adventure,
Worlds awaken wide.
Happy #WorldBookDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Quills dance on parchment,
Ink spills tales like summer rain,

#HappyBirthdayWilliamShakespeare from @ClamBakeSanta

Whispers of the breeze,
Laughter blooms like wildflowers,
Joy fills every heart.
#HappyBirthdayJamesBuchanan from @ClamBakeSanta

theme: National Pigs in a Blanket Day
haiku:

Pages turn like leaves,

#HappyBirthdayEllaFitzgerald from @ClamBakeSanta

Happy #NationalPretzelDay from @ClamBakeSanta
